should_trigger.input: I want to understand how this API works, not just get code that uses it
should_trigger.reason: Explicit learning intent — calibrate how much to delegate vs explain

should_trigger.input: AI said to refactor this function — is that advice correct?
should_trigger.reason: Requests evaluation of AI output, should treat as unverified input

should_trigger.input: I want to be able to explain this change in a review, help me understand it
should_trigger.reason: Learning priority before code completion — calibration is needed

should_not_trigger.input: Fix this typo in the variable name
should_not_trigger.reason: Trivial change with no learning concern — no calibration needed

should_not_trigger.input: Implement this function according to the design doc
should_not_trigger.reason: Clear implementation task is implement-changes, no learning calibration needed
Code review is review-changes, not calibration
